title: [InstCombine] Fix FMF propagation in `copysign Mag, (copysign ?, X) -> copysign Mag, X`

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_constant_inner_magnitude(float %x, float %z) {
  %s = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float 1.0, float %z)
  %r = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %x, float %s)
  ret float %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions 'any magnitude' but existing tests don't show constant magnitude in inner copysign. This validates the generalization works with constant values.

alive2.src:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_constant_inner_magnitude(float %x, float %z) {
  %s = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float 1.0, float %z)
  %r = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %x, float %s)
  ret float %r
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define float @copysign_constant_inner_magnitude(float %x, float %z) {
#0:
  %s = copysign float 1.000000, %z
  %r = copysign float %x, %s
  ret float %r
}
=>
define float @copysign_constant_inner_magnitude(float %x, float %z) {
#0:
  %r = copysign float %x, %z
  ret float %r
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_triple_nested_chain(float %a, float %b, float %c, float %d) {
  %s1 = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %b, float %c)
  %s2 = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %a, float %s1)
  %r = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %d, float %s2)
  ret float %r
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_triple_nested_chain(float %a, float %b, float %c, float %d) {
  %s2 = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %a, float %c)
  %r = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %d, float %s2)
  ret float %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary describes two-level nesting but doesn't mention chained/multiple applications. The patch can apply iteratively through InstCombine's fixed-point iteration.

alive2.src:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_triple_nested_chain(float %a, float %b, float %c, float %d) {
  %s1 = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %b, float %c)
  %s2 = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %a, float %s1)
  %r = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %d, float %s2)
  ret float %r
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define float @copysign_triple_nested_chain(float %a, float %b, float %c, float %d) {
#0:
  %s1 = copysign float %b, %c
  %s2 = copysign float %a, %s1
  %r = copysign float %d, %s2
  ret float %r
}
=>
define float @copysign_triple_nested_chain(float %a, float %b, float %c, float %d) {
#0:
  %r = copysign float %d, %c
  ret float %r
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

declare <4 x float> @llvm.copysign.v4f32(<4 x float>, <4 x float>) #0

define <4 x float> @copysign_vector(<4 x float> %x, <4 x float> %y, <4 x float> %z) {
  %s = call <4 x float> @llvm.copysign.v4f32(<4 x float> %y, <4 x float> %z)
  %r = call <4 x float> @llvm.copysign.v4f32(<4 x float> %x, <4 x float> %s)
  ret <4 x float> %r
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary only discusses scalar float types; vector types (<4 x float>) are not mentioned in the pattern description or existing tests
